title: thlaspi hastulatum
intro: Thlaspi hastulatum, also known as horned pepperwort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Thlaspi hastulatum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Herbal preparations of Thlaspi hastulatum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed in a variety of ways.
